## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation
- [ ] Frontend unit tests
- [ ] Frontend integration tests
- [ ] Backend verify

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs
- [ ] No sensitive data committed
